reviews.review_title: St. Jude Themed Where the Voices Go.
reviews.review_description: Very graphically lush and capable. More so than St Jude Hall of Heroes'. Contains many 'floors' one for each question that the respondents answer, and you listen too. I definitely felt like I was in some kind of higher spiritual plane of goodness (I didn't want to use the word Heavenly), with the intent of the app as a whole and the aesethic of it.
